---
title: "example"
format: html
editor: visual
---

\# Hello World

This is a simple Quarto file.

\## Test Content \
RStudio + Git + GitHub Demo!

## Merged Content (main + testbranch)

This content combines changes from both main and testbranch branches.
- Main branch: Conflicting content example.
- Testbranch: Added section example.
